objective: Address the 'monotonous' feedback by transitioning the Slate/Indigo color scheme to the 'Premium Editorial' theme (Warm Minimalist) with modern structural tweaks.

completed: Applied 'Premium Editorial' colors (Warm Ochre #C87A53 accents, Deep Charcoal #1E1E1E text, Ecru/Sand backgrounds #F9F8F6 / #E4E1DB).
Replaced rigid standard card borders with modern soft box-shadows (rgba(0,0,0,0.03)) to make elements float.
Replaced heavy premium card borders with a Warm Ochre border and a delicate matching shadow glow (rgba(200,122,83,0.12)).
Increased all border-radius values (e.g. 12px -> 16px, 10px -> 14px) for a friendlier, modern SaaS geometry.
Retained a distinct Deep Charcoal (#1E1E1E) for the primary Kakao CTA button to ensure it stands apart from standard Ochre accents.

decisions_locked: Adopted Theme 1 (Premium Editorial) to provide the strongest departure from the clinical/tech-heavy vibe, giving the template an organic, high-end editorial feel.
acceptance_criteria: Inline HTML contains the new structural tweaks (shadows instead of hard borders) and Premium Editorial color hexes.
Linter and unit tests pass successfully without issues.
completed_items: Applied Premium Editorial inline styling to redesign-v4v1.html
next_actions: Review the updated HTML in a browser to confirm the warm minimalist aesthetic and softer shadows look good.
